scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/server & npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run docker:up && timeout 5 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:generate && npm run db:seed
scripts.render:build: npm install && npm run db:migrate:deploy && npm run build
